title: CashBack Motors
description: A comprehensive digital platform for motorcycle sales, featuring advanced search, filtering, and a modern responsive interface built with server-side rendering.

title: EVE Robot
description: A teleoperated robotics project engineered with ROS 2 and Raspberry Pi 4, featuring ultrasonic sensors and a PlayStation controller interface for remote operation.

title: SIC/XE Assembler
description: A complete 2-pass assembler built from scratch, demonstrating deep understanding of low-level microprocessor architecture and machine code generation.

title: Bean Plant Classification
description: A machine learning model utilizing LightGBM for accurate data classification of bean plant varieties, featuring data preprocessing and model evaluation pipelines.
